parsed_review.summary: CP00-282 is a descriptor-only RP08 Email/Office-Native DMS closeout pack (150 units, risk C, range RP08.P03.M06.S13-RP08.P04.M03.S20) that closes the RP08.P03 descriptor scope and opens P04 UI foundation descriptors. Read-only review (Read/Grep/Glob) of the review packet, changed-file scope, registry/service/validators source, test suite, contract, validator script, manifest, and live plan found the pack internally consistent and the pack-level claims honestly scoped. The pack does NOT claim production_ready=true: manifest.json and command-evidence.json both set production_ready:false with status implemented_pending_review / pending_final_closeout, so the production_ready gate is preserved rather than weakened. The authority boundary holds: descriptor.authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false, no_write_attestation.promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false and claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false, with allowed Claude tools limited to Read/Grep/Glob — all asserted by the validator (deepEqual to source registry) and the test suite. Hermes patterns are descriptor-only (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false, all dispatch/runtime flags false; receipt shape descriptor_only_no_write), not product runtime. No-write/no-real-data boundaries are comprehensively enforced (no_real_data:true, writes_product_state:false, loads_real_fixture_data:false, synthetic_only:true). CP178+ review hardening is present: forbidden_review_evidence covers auth failures, zero-byte output, malformed JSON, fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, and missing required fields; readiness report shows auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1436-byte stdout) with no invalid attempts for this pack. Internal consistency verified: deliverable counts, phase counts (80+70), and micro-title counts each sum to 150; first/last unit IDs, source_ledger_sha, and next-pack pointers (CP00-283 / RP08.P04.M03.S21) match across baseline, manifest, contract, registry, and the live plan where CP00-282 sits at the queue head. Changed-file scope is accurate and unrelated dirty files are correctly excluded. All 20 recorded gate commands exit 0. No findings at any severity. This PASS is a read-only reviewer recommendation; human final approval is retained per the authority boundary.
